title: A queered made-up art history? Make-up, painting and art
further_info: Recommended Reading • Garb, Tamar, The painted face : portraits of women in France, 1814-1914, 2007 • Wegenstein, Bernadette, The cosmetic gaze: body modification and the construction of beauty, Cambridge, Massachusetts 2012. • Cockx, Romy et al., Maskerade make-up & Ensor, Belgium 2024. • Angeloglou, Maggie, A history of make-up, 1970. • Belting, Hans, Face and Mask: A Double History, 2022 • Festa, Lynn, Cosmetic Differences: The Changing Faces of England and France, in: Studies in Eighteenth-Century Culture 34/1, 2005, 25–54, https://muse.jhu.edu/article/265444 (letzter Zugriff am 19.1.2026). • Janecke, Christian (Hg.), Gesichter auftragen: Argumente zum Schminken, Marburg 2006. Topics for oral presentation will be assigned in the first session.
